audit: 2026-06-01 (p51): Added 3 split batches (p51a, p51b, p51c) totalling 30 Qs via scheduled remote agent. Live disk-state pre-fire: Paeds 873, Obgyn 837, Psych 666, Medicine 766, total 3142. Allocation: Paeds 2 L3 + 5 L4 + 1 L5 = 8, Obgyn 4 L3 + 2 L4 + 1 L5 = 7, Psych 3 L3 + 3 L4 + 2 L5 = 8, Med 3 L3 + 2 L4 + 2 L5 = 7. Overall 12 L3 / 12 L4 / 6 L5 / 0 L2.
